_doc: Localizable battle + post-battle strings. Keys map to lookup paths used in battle.js. Add new boss kinds by extending victoryDialogue/runDialogue, no JS code change needed. {enemy} and {growth} placeholders are substituted at runtime.
noPartner: (your party is exhausted — return to rest)

lossDialogue.indoor: (you withdraw from the gym to recover)
lossDialogue.default: (your partner fell — return to a safe point)

captureCircle.duplicate: {enemy}'s presence is already in the roster. {growth}
